deep_dive.title: PanoWorld: Real-World Panoramic Generation
deep_dive.abstract: In this work, we aim to address the challenge of long-range memory in panoramic world models by exploiting the rotation-equivariant property of omnidirectional representations, where rotation can be treated as an implicit geometric transformation.Building on this insight, we propose PanoWorld, which simplifies camera trajectories into translations via fixed headings for both current-action modeling and long-range memory through Dense Panoramic Ray-Conditioning (DPRC) and Geometry-aware Memory Augmentation (GMA).Then, a three-stage training pipeline is introduced to progressively optimize each component. To better evaluate physical consistency under large-scale spatial variations and diverse illumination conditions, where existing datasets are relatively stable, we construct World360, a large-scale dataset consisting of both real-world video clips collected via panoramic unmanned aerial vehicles and high-quality simulated clips generated by AirSim360.Extensive experiments on World360 demonstrate the effectiveness of PanoWorld, outperforming alternative methods by a large margin.Our models, training code, and dataset will be publicly available. More information can be found on our project page: https://lihaoy-ux.github.io/panoworld-page/.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: real-world panoramic generation using rotation-equivariant omnidirectional representations
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用旋转等变全向表示的真实世界全景生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用旋转等变全向表示的真实世界全景生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用旋转等变全向表示的真实世界全景生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: PanoWorld addresses long-range memory in panoramic world models by exploiting the rotation-equivariant property, proposing Dense Panoramic Ray-Conditioning and Geometry-aware Memory Augmentation for consistent panoramic generation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有全景世界模型在处理长程记忆时面临挑战。PanoWorld利用全向表示的旋转等变特性，将相机轨迹简化为固定航向的平移，提出密集全景光线条件（DPRC）和几何感知记忆增强（GMA）方法。通过三阶段训练逐步优化各组件，并在构建的新型大规模多样化光照数据集上验证了物理一致性。该方法为全景新视角合成提供了高效且一致的方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有全景世界模型在处理长程记忆时面临挑战。PanoWorld利用全向表示的旋转等变特性，将相机轨迹简化为固定航向的平移，提出密集全景光线条件（DPRC）和几何感知记忆增强（GMA）方法。通过三阶段训练逐步优化各组件，并在构建的新型大规模多样化光照数据集上验证了物理一致性。该方法为全景新视角合成提供了高效且一致的方案。

quick_skim.title: StereoSplat+: Feed-Forward Stereo Gaussian Splatting with Diffusion-Assisted Progressive Inference
quick_skim.abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled high-quality, render-ready scene representations for novel-view synthesis. However, most existing 3DGS pipelines rely on multi-view observations (or non-causal access to future frames) to achieve sufficient coverage, which is often unavailable in on-device robotics and AR settings where sensing is restricted to a single stereo rig. Recovering a high-quality 3DGS scene from one stereo observation, therefore, remains challenging due to occlusions, limited field of view, and missing geometry. We present StereoSplat+, a diffusion-enhanced feed-forward framework that enables causal reconstruction from a single stereo pair. Our method builds on two key components. First, we propose StereoSplat, an input-invariant feed-forward 3D Gaussian estimator that takes a variable number of posed stereo pairs as input and predicts high-quality 3D Gaussians. StereoSplat fuses complementary geometry cues via a cost-volume branch and a triplane-based 3D volume branch and leverages continuous pose encoding to generalize across view counts and camera configurations. Second, since multiple posed stereo pairs are typically unavailable at inference time, we introduce a diffusion-enhanced one-shot progressive inference scheme called StereoSplat+: starting from one stereo pair, we render novel stereo views from the predicted 3DGS, refine them with a one-step diffusion enhancer, and feed them back as additional inputs to update the 3DGS. Experiments on the KITTI-360 dataset show that StereoSplat+ improves novel-view rendering quality and geometry accuracy, especially in occluded regions and under strong view extrapolation, outperforming recent feed-forward 3DGS baselines.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Feed-forward stereo 3DGS for novel view synthesis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 前馈立体3DGS用于新视角合成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 前馈立体3DGS用于新视角合成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 前馈立体3DGS用于新视角合成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: StereoSplat+ enables novel-view synthesis from a single stereo pair by combining feed-forward Gaussian prediction with diffusion-based progressive refinement for high-quality 3D scenes.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: StereoSplat+提出了一种前馈框架，仅从单对立体图像即可重建3D高斯场景用于新视角合成。该方法结合扩散模型进行渐进式推理，克服了单目或双目输入下的遮挡和视野限制。实验表明，在多个数据集上，其渲染质量显著优于现有立体新视角合成方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: StereoSplat+提出了一种前馈框架，仅从单对立体图像即可重建3D高斯场景用于新视角合成。该方法结合扩散模型进行渐进式推理，克服了单目或双目输入下的遮挡和视野限制。实验表明，在多个数据集上，其渲染质量显著优于现有立体新视角合成方法。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: 3D Gaussian Splatting method for novel view synthesis

quick_skim.title: SplatCtrl: Perception-Action Coupling via Gaussian Scene Representations and Reactive Robot Control
quick_skim.abstract: Robotic manipulators excel in structured environments but face substantial challenges in unstructured and dynamic settings. This paper presents SplatCtrl, a unified framework for real-time scene reconstruction and reactive robot motion generation to enable collision-free robotic arm control in previously unseen and continuously changing environments. Building on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS), we introduce a hybrid voxel-based filtering and dynamic Gaussian relocation strategy that supports efficient scene reconstruction from RGB-D streams while accommodating environmental changes. For safe and reactive control, we further propose a method for deriving continuous signed distance functions from isotropic Gaussians, providing stable and differentiable collision probability estimates that bridge classical distance fields with the modern implicit representation. These continuous distance metrics are incorporated into control barrier functions, resulting in a unified perception-action coupling framework that supports smooth and reliable real-time motion generation in response to scene changes. Experimental validation in simulation, on physical robot, and within shared human-robot workspace demonstrates the framework's effectiveness, achieving integrated scene reconstruction and reactive control in uncertain, and dynamic environments.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses 3D Gaussian Splatting for scene reconstruction and reactive control
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用3D高斯泼溅进行场景重建与反应式控制
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用3D高斯泼溅进行场景重建与反应式控制
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用3D高斯泼溅进行场景重建与反应式控制
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SplatCtrl combines 3DGS with reactive robot control, enabling collision-free operation in dynamic environments via signed distance functions from Gaussians.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: SplatCtrl提出一个统一框架，将3D高斯泼溅用于实时场景重建，并从中提取连续符号距离函数以实现机器人碰撞规避控制。该方法通过混合体素滤波和动态高斯重定位策略处理环境变化。实验表明其在非结构化动态场景中的有效性，为感知-行动耦合提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: SplatCtrl提出一个统一框架，将3D高斯泼溅用于实时场景重建，并从中提取连续符号距离函数以实现机器人碰撞规避控制。该方法通过混合体素滤波和动态高斯重定位策略处理环境变化。实验表明其在非结构化动态场景中的有效性，为感知-行动耦合提供了新思路。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: 3D Gaussian Splatting method for novel view synthesis

quick_skim.title: AnythingReality: Robust Online Gaussian Splatting SLAM for Open-Vocabulary VR Scene Exploration
quick_skim.abstract: We present a novel integrated architecture for robust online 3D Gaussian splatting, real-time VR exploration, and speech-driven Vision-Language-Model interaction. Unlike methods assuming clean depth or external poses, our system combines ORB-SLAM3-based pose estimation with online Gaussian reconstruction for noisy real-world data. A VR pipeline enables immersive exploration of incremental reconstructions; a semantic module transcribes voice commands, generates scene descriptions, and records points of interest. Against state-of-the-art online Gaussian splatting methods, we improve image quality on our dataset (+14.5% PSNR, +8.6% SSIM, -14.3% LPIPS) and TUM-RGBD (+11.7% PSNR, +7.8% SSIM, -21.6% LPIPS), with comparable or superior frame rates via quality-speed configurations. We achieve an 88% VLM object-recognition rate.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Online Gaussian Splatting SLAM for VR scene exploration, enabling immersive novel view synthesis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 在线高斯泼溅SLAM用于虚拟现实场景探索，支持沉浸式新视角合成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 在线高斯泼溅SLAM用于虚拟现实场景探索，支持沉浸式新视角合成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 在线高斯泼溅SLAM用于虚拟现实场景探索，支持沉浸式新视角合成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: AnythingReality integrates online 3D Gaussian Splatting with VR for robust SLAM and open-vocabulary scene exploration, improving image quality over baselines.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有在线3DGS方法依赖精确深度或外部位姿，在真实噪声数据中鲁棒性不足。本文提出集成ORB-SLAM3与在线高斯重建的架构，实现鲁棒SLAM和实时VR探索，并加入语音驱动的视觉语言模型交互。在自有数据集和TUM-RGBD上PSNR分别提升14.5%和11.7%，SSIM分别提升8.6%和7.8%，LPIPS分别降低14.3%和21.6%，同时支持开放词汇场景描述和兴趣点记录。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有在线3DGS方法依赖精确深度或外部位姿，在真实噪声数据中鲁棒性不足。本文提出集成ORB-SLAM3与在线高斯重建的架构，实现鲁棒SLAM和实时VR探索，并加入语音驱动的视觉语言模型交互。在自有数据集和TUM-RGBD上PSNR分别提升14.5%和11.7%，SSIM分别提升8.6%和7.8%，LPIPS分别降低14.3%和21.6%，同时支持开放词汇场景描述和兴趣点记录。
